user_query:
You are my research lead for a new venture called GreenRoof Analytics. Please do the following end-to-end and write all artifacts under output/:

1) Read my context docs in input/:
- input/project_brief.md (vision, name, and goals)
- input/target_markets.csv (initial cities/policies to consider)
- input/constraints.yaml (budget/timeline/compliance notes)

2) Run 2–3 targeted web searches to ground our work in authoritative sources about urban green roofs (benefits, stormwater credits/fees, heat island mitigation, and adoption programs in major U.S. cities). For each search, save the raw search JSON exactly as returned by your search tool to:
- output/research/search_1.json
- output/research/search_2.json
- (optional) output/research/search_3.json
Each JSON must include: query, count, disclaimer, security, and results (array of objects with title, url, snippet, trust{score, tier, reason}). Aim to include at least one high-trust domain (.gov, .edu, or similarly authoritative) across these searches.

3) Synthesize a project philosophy document that will guide all decisions. Use the four-layer structure and add a decision criteria section. Save to:
- output/docs/metaphysics/YYYY-MM-DD-greenroof-analytics-philosophy.md
The document must include these sections with clear headings:
- I. Ontology
- II. Teleology
- III. Methodology
- IV. Boundaries
- V. Decision Criteria
Include a References section or appendix that cites at least two sources (as URLs), with at least one coming from a high-trust domain that appears in your saved search JSON(s).

4) Create a lean go-to-market plan tailored to the brief, constraints, and search findings. Save to:
- output/plan/lean_go_to_market.md
It must include the following sections with these exact headings:
- MVP
- First Customers
- Pricing
- Marketing Plan

5) Create a folder-based company skeleton we can expand later. Under output/company/greenroof-analytics/, create:
- departments/sales/supervisor/workers/
- departments/marketing/supervisor/workers/
- departments/operations/supervisor/workers/
- departments/hr/supervisor/workers/
- departments/accounting/supervisor/workers/
Also create output/company/greenroof-analytics/strategy.md that fills in these headings with substantive content drawn from input/ docs:
- Big Obsessional Goal (BOG)
- Current Bottleneck
- Target Audience
- Positioning

Make sure all outputs are internally consistent with the input files and your cited sources.
